source:
'use client'; import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'; import { api } from '@/lib/api'; import { useState } from 'react'; import { LineChart, Line, BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, PieChart, Pie, Cell, Legend } from 'recharts'; import { TrendingUp, DollarSign, ShoppingCart } from 'lucide-react'; const COLORS = ['#F97316', '#3B82F6', '#10B981', '#8B5CF6', '#EC4899', '#06B6D4']; export default function AdminAnalyticsPage() { const [period, setPeriod] = useState('30d'); const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({ queryKey: ['admin-analytics', period], queryFn: () => api.getAdminSalesAnalytics(period), }); return (

Analytics

Sales and revenue insights

{[{ key: '7d', label: '7 Days' }, { key: '30d', label: '30 Days' }, { key: '90d', label: '90 Days' }, { key: '1y', label: '1 Year' }].map((p) => ( ))}
{/* Summary Cards */}

Total Revenue

${((data?.revenueByDay || []).reduce((sum: number, d: { revenue?: string | number }) => sum + parseFloat(String(d.revenue || 0)), 0)).toFixed(2)}

Total Orders

{(data?.revenueByDay || []).reduce((sum: number, d: { orders?: string | number }) => sum + parseInt(String(d.orders || 0)), 0)}

Average Order Value

${(data?.averageOrderValue || 0).toFixed(2)}

{/* Revenue Chart */}

Revenue Trend

{isLoading ? (
) : ( new Date(v).toLocaleDateString('en', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })} stroke="#9ca3af" fontSize={12} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} /> `$${v}`} /> [`$${value.toFixed(2)}`, 'Revenue']} /> )}
{/* Orders by Status */}

Orders by Status

`${props.name}: ${props.value}`} labelLine={false}> {(data?.ordersByStatus || []).map((_: unknown, idx: number) => ( ))}

Orders per Day

new Date(v).toLocaleDateString('en', { day: 'numeric' })} stroke="#9ca3af" fontSize={12} tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
); }

source:
'use client'; import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'; import { api } from '@/lib/api'; import { useState } from 'react'; import { Settings, Globe, Truck, CreditCard, Users, Shield, Mail, Save, Plus, UserCog } from 'lucide-react'; function SettingsSection({ title, description, icon: Icon, children }: { title: string; description: string; icon: any; children: React.ReactNode }) { return (

{title}

{description}

{children}
); } export default function AdminSettingsPage() { const queryClient = useQueryClient(); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('general'); const { data: staffData } = useQuery({ queryKey: ['admin-staff'], queryFn: () => api.getAdminStaff(), enabled: activeTab === 'staff', }); const updateRoleMutation = useMutation({ mutationFn: ({ id, role }: { id: string; role: string }) => api.updateStaffRole(id, role), onSuccess: () => queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['admin-staff'] }), }); const tabs = [ { key: 'general', label: 'General', icon: Globe }, { key: 'staff', label: 'Staff & Roles', icon: UserCog }, { key: 'shipping', label: 'Shipping', icon: Truck }, { key: 'payments', label: 'Payments', icon: CreditCard }, { key: 'email', label: 'Email', icon: Mail }, { key: 'security', label: 'Security', icon: Shield }, ]; return (

Settings

Manage your store configuration

{/* Tabs */}
{tabs.map((tab) => ( ))}
{/* General */} {activeTab === 'general' && (

'use client'; import { RotateCcw, ShieldCheck, HelpCircle, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; import Link from 'next/link'; const returnSteps = [ { title: 'Contact Support', description: 'Reach out to our team within 30 days of receiving your item.' }, { title: 'Pack Safely', description: 'Repack the furniture in its original packaging or similar high-quality materials.' }, { title: 'Schedule Pickup', description: 'Our logistics partner will schedule a convenient time for pickup.' }, { title: 'Receive Refund', description: 'A refund will be issued once the item is inspected at our warehouse.' }, ]; export default function ReturnsPage() { return (
{/* Dark Hero */}

Returns & Exchanges

We want you to love your furniture. If for any reason you aren't completely satisfied, our return process is straightforward and fair.

{/* Return Policy */}

30-Day Satisfaction Guarantee

You have 30 days from the date of delivery to initiate a return for any standard furniture piece. Whether it’s not the right fit or the style wasn't what you expected, we offer a no-questions-asked return policy for all standard designs.

Exclusions

Please note that fully bespoke or custom-designed pieces are non-returnable unless they arrive damaged or defective. Final sale items and floor models are also excluded from our standard return policy.

{/* Steps */}

How to Start a Return

{returnSteps.map((step, i) => (
{i + 1}

{step.title}

{step.description}

))}
{/* FAQ Link */}

Need more help?

Check our FAQ for detailed return information.

); }

Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
